positive: Minimalist woodland creature portrait, centered composition. A majestic fox silhouette standing on mossy rocks at sunrise. The fox is depicted in a stylized, high-contrast line art style with bold, solid patches of color that pop against a soft, gradient background of deep twilight blue and warm burnt orange. The scene should be extremely clean and flat-design friendly, perfect for direct apparel printing. Subtle nature elements like stylized ferns and simple constellations are included around the fox's base, maintaining a geometric, graphic aesthetic. Cinematic, ethereal lighting casting sharp outlines, vector illustration quality, highly detailed, clean lines, graphic design poster.
